guidance: Promote the Black Arrow platform (blackarrow.ltd/app) through its real offers: the 14-day full-access free trial (no card needed, cancel anytime) and the referral deal (refer a business, when they subscribe you both get a free month, tracked automatically). Angle it around a real pain the platform kills (tool sprawl, missed calls, slow follow-up, no revenue reporting). Lead with value, end with the TRIAL keyword CTA. Never invent features or plan pricing; point plan questions to the site.
evidence_note: Only features and offers actually published on blackarrow.ltd/app. No invented pricing or results.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Platform / Free Trial Promo' was the most under-served eligible category (target 12%, recent 10%).
post_rationale: Carousels lead saves and depth for educational offer content. Tool sprawl is a real, specific pain point that frames the platform's unified feature set and referral offer without hype.

guidance: Show, in a clearly-labeled illustrative way, how a Black Arrow system works (e.g. an automated lead follow-up sequence, missed-call text-back, review request flow).
evidence_note: Label as an example/demonstration. NEVER imply it is a specific client's live account or claim a performance result.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Demonstrations / System Walkthroughs' was the most under-served eligible category (target 10%, recent 7%).
post_rationale: Carousels lead saves and engagement depth. This fills the Demonstrations category with a full quiz-to-revenue funnel walkthrough, a stage this account hasn't shown end to end before.

guidance: State a sharp, defensible point of view or contrarian take on how service businesses actually grow. Confident, specific, never gimmicky engagement-bait.
evidence_note: Framed clearly as Black Arrow's view; no fabricated proof.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Contrarian / Brand Point of View' was the most under-served eligible category (target 5%, recent 3%).
post_rationale: Reels reward sharp, share-worthy points of view right now (DM sends are Instagram's top 2026 ranking signal), and this reframes a conversion problem owners usually blame on staff as a systems problem instead, a fresh contrarian angle this account hasn't run.
